dimensions.name: Delivery
dimensions.detail: 3 of ~4 agents responded (Elanor, Míriel, Narvi). Unknown if more agents are in group.

dimensions.name: Response Rate
dimensions.detail: 3 unique agents responded within 60s. Narvi responded twice (once as test runner, once as himself).

dimensions.name: Relevance
dimensions.detail: All responses included name + current work as asked. Narvi's first response was about running his own test (slightly off-topic).

dimensions.name: Latency
dimensions.detail: Avg response time: 8.9s. Elanor: 4.6s, Míriel: 6.4s, Narvi: 8.9s/15.9s. All under 30s = good.

improvements: First baseline run. No improvements made yet.
issues: Narvi tried to run his own competing test simultaneously — need to handle test-awareness so agents don't duplicate the test runner's job.
